calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Continued To Feb-28-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Plaintiff Pro Per is sanction $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC has been cont'd to Feb-28-2023. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Continued To Nov-29-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to November 29, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-27-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SASHA FARAHI, Esq. of BD&J, PC (Tel: 310-887-1818) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff;
